# RavenDOS — Intelligence, Architected.

> RavenDOS is a product-driven technology studio headquartered in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. We design, build, and ship intelligent platforms — end to end. Our team specializes in AI/ML development, full stack software, DevOps, DevSecOps, mobile and web application development, website design, and cybersecurity.

## Company Overview

RavenDOS Business Ventures LLP builds technology that matters. We are not an outsourcing shop — we are a product-driven studio that designs, develops, and launches our own intelligent platforms, and applies the same engineering excellence to client projects. Based in Hyderabad, we serve businesses across Telangana, India, and globally.

## Services

### AI & Machine Learning Development
We design, train, and deploy intelligent systems that solve real business problems. Our AI/ML services include:
- Custom ML model development and training
- Natural Language Processing (NLP) solutions
- Computer Vision and image recognition systems
- Generative AI and Large Language Model (LLM) integration
- AI chatbot and conversational AI development
- Predictive analytics and recommendation engines
- MLOps pipelines and model monitoring
- AI-powered automation and workflow optimization

Our AI expertise is proven through products like IntiGrade, an AI-powered exam evaluation platform used in real-world education.

Learn more: https://ravendos.com/services/ai-ml

### Full Stack Development
We build complete software products from database to deployment. Our full stack development services include:
- Custom SaaS platform development
- MVP development and rapid prototyping
- MERN / MEAN stack web applications
- Enterprise software solutions
- Backend API and microservices architecture
- Database design, optimization, and migration
- Third-party API integration and automation
- Legacy system modernization and re-architecture

We deliver end-to-end product development with a single team — no handoffs, no gaps. Ideal for startups building MVPs and enterprises modernizing legacy systems.

Learn more: https://ravendos.com/services/full-stack-development

### DevOps & Cloud Infrastructure
We architect resilient cloud infrastructure and streamlined CI/CD pipelines. Our DevOps services include:
- CI/CD pipeline design and implementation
- Cloud architecture on AWS, Azure, and GCP
- Kubernetes and container orchestration
- Docker containerization services
- Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Pulumi)
- GitHub Actions, Jenkins, and GitLab CI/CD automation
- Monitoring, logging, and observability (Grafana, Prometheus)
- Cloud migration, cost optimization, and managed DevOps

Learn more: https://ravendos.com/services/devops

### DevSecOps
We embed security into every stage of your development pipeline. Our DevSecOps services include:
- Shift-left security integration in CI/CD pipelines
- SAST and DAST tool integration (SonarQube, OWASP ZAP, Snyk)
- Container and Kubernetes security hardening
- Infrastructure as Code security scanning
- Compliance automation (SOC 2, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS)
- Security-focused code review and developer training

DevSecOps ensures your software is secure by design — not patched after the fact. Our unique position at the intersection of DevOps and cybersecurity means we practice both.

Learn more: https://ravendos.com/services/devsecops

### App Development
We build performant, scalable applications from concept to launch. Our app development services include:
- Cross-platform mobile apps (React Native, Flutter)
- Progressive Web Apps (PWA) and responsive web apps
- Web applications (Next.js, React, Node.js)
- Backend API development and microservices
- Real-time features and WebSocket integrations
- Database design and optimization
- App Store and Play Store deployment

Learn more: https://ravendos.com/services/app-development

### Website Design & Development
We craft high-performance websites that balance stunning design with technical excellence. Our web design services include:
- Custom website design and branding
- Responsive and mobile-first development
- SEO-optimized architecture and performance
- E-commerce website development
- Landing page design and conversion optimization
- Website redesign and modernization
- Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS development

Tech stack: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, GSAP.

Learn more: https://ravendos.com/services/web-design

### Network & Cyber Security
We design secure network architectures and implement comprehensive cybersecurity measures. Our security services include:
- Network architecture design and security hardening
- Vulnerability assessment and penetration testing
- Firewall, IDS/IPS configuration and management
- Zero-trust architecture implementation
- SIEM deployment and Security Operations Center (SOC) setup
- Identity and Access Management (IAM) implementation
- Compliance consulting (ISO 27001, SOC 2, PCI-DSS)
- Managed security monitoring and incident response

Learn more: https://ravendos.com/services/network-security

## Products

### IntiGrade
Website: https://intigrade.in
Tagline: Grading Made Simple.
AI-powered exam evaluation that bridges the gap between pen and paper. IntiGrade scans, analyzes, and grades physical tests instantly. Built with computer vision and natural language processing to understand handwritten answers and provide accurate, consistent grading.

### DiagnosticWale
Website: https://diagnosticwale.com
Tagline: Advanced Diagnostics, Trusted Results.
India's trusted diagnostic platform connecting patients with labs and providing comprehensive health monitoring and medical testing solutions.

## Philosophy

We design systems that think. We architect platforms that scale. We build what we believe the world needs — then we prove it.

## Technology Stack

- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Mobile: React Native, Flutter
- Backend: Node.js, Python
- AI/ML: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Hugging Face, OpenAI API, LangChain
- Cloud: AWS, Azure, GCP
- DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, GitHub Actions, Jenkins
- DevSecOps: SonarQube, OWASP ZAP, Snyk, Trivy
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
- Animations: GSAP, WebGL (OGL)
